nasb.text: You shall not take ransom for him who has fled to his city of refuge, that he may return to live in the land before the death of the priest.

esv.text: And you shall accept no ransom for him who has fled to his city of refuge, that he may return to dwell in the land before the death of the high priest.

cnv.text: 逃到避難城的人，你們也不可收取他的贖價，使他在大祭司未死以前回到本地居住。

ccb.text: 不可收逃进避难城之人的赎金，让他在大祭司逝世前返回家园。
